pass1_value.note: Docs show Developer API Keys are created from the site dashboard (Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys), but the documentation does not state whether obtaining working API credentials requires a paid plan, trial, or partner approval—public docs do not state plan/approval constraints.

final_value.note: Squarespace support docs explain where to generate Developer API keys in a site’s Settings > Advanced > Developer API keys and how to use them, but do not state whether generating/using working keys requires a paid plan vs. trial, or any partner/developer approval constraints.

pass1_value.note: Requires access to a Squarespace site/account to create Developer API Keys from the site dashboard (Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys). Public docs do not state whether a paid plan or partner approval is required.

final_value.note: Docs show you can generate Developer API Keys from a Squarespace site dashboard (Settings > Advanced > Developer API Keys) and use them as Bearer tokens, but the official public docs reviewed do not clarify whether a paid plan/trial status or partner approval is required to obtain working credentials.
